# KANBAN_CARD

**Database:** Operational

**Description:** Stores the various KANBAN_CARDs generated by KANBAN_CARD components.

## Columns

| Name | Data Type | Nullable | Default | Primary | FK To | Description |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| CardPrintedOn | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | Date of kanban printing. |
| CompletionDate | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | End Date when card status was changed for the last time. |
| Container | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | CONTAINER | Container name, link to Container table. |
| CurrentLocation | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False |  | Current card location. In most cases this reflects warehouse location but in some this is external location eg. supplier that is store as warehouse location. |
| EmployeeID | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | EMPLOYEE | Employee responsible for kanban, link to EMPLOYEE table. |
| FromDepartment | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | DEPARTMENT | Source Department. Linked to the DEPARTMENT table |
| FromFacility | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | FACILITY | Source Facility. Linked to the FACILITY table. |
| FromLocationID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | WAREHOUSE_LOCATION | Source location id, linked to the Warehouse_Location table. |
| FromPartnerID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | PARTNER | Partner id, linked to the Partner table. |
| FromWarehouse | NVARCHAR(10) | True |  | False | WAREHOUSE | Source WareHouse. Linked to the WareHouse table |
| FromWorkcenter | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | WORK_CENTER | Source Work Center. Linked to the WORK_CENTER table |
| FromZone | NVARCHAR(20) | True |  | False | ZONE | Source zone, linked to the Zone table. |
| ID | INT(10,0) | False |  | True |  | Kanban card identifier. Unique identifier of a record (key) in a table. |
| KanbanCardNumber | NVARCHAR(40) | False |  | False |  | Kanban Card Number. |
| KanbanCardStatus | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | KANBAN_CARD_STATUS | User-defined status ID. Link to KANBAN_CARD_STATUS table. - empty - not processed by anyone- in progress - in process of fulfilment- full - ready to be used- on-hold - not to be used |
| LeadTimeInSeconds | INT(10,0) | True |  | False |  | Lead time in seconds to replenish kanban. |
| LotNo | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | LOT_NO | Lot Number.  Linked to LOT_NO table. |
| OprSequenceNo | NVARCHAR(20) | True |  | False | WIP_OPERATION | WIP Operation Number, link to WIP_OPERATION table. |
| PriorityID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | PRIORITY | Priority of the card. Can be used when multiple cards are deliver to the same location. |
| ProductID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | LOT_NO | Product Identifier. Linked to the PRODUCT table. |
| ProgressStatus | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | PROGRESS_STATUS | Deliver status, link to PROGRESS_STATUS table. |
| ReplenishQuantity | DECIMAL(28,10) | False |  | False |  | Current Kanban Quantity. |
| ReplenishStraContSequenceNo | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT | Link to REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT table. |
| ReplenishStrategyID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | REPLENISH_STRATEGY_CONTENT | Replenishment Strategy ID. Linked to the REPLENISH_STRATEGY table. |
| SerialNo | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | SERIAL_NO | Serial Number, link to SERIAL_NO table. |
| SourceType | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | REPLENISH_STRATEGY_SRC_TYPE | Available values: Vendor, Production, Internal source, External source. |
| StartDate | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | Start Date when card status was changed for the last time. |
| ToDepartment | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | DEPARTMENT | Destination Department, linked to the Department table. |
| ToFacility | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | FACILITY | Destination Facility, linked to the Facility table. |
| ToLocationID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | WAREHOUSE_LOCATION | Destination Warehouse Location, linked to Warehouse_Location table. |
| ToPartnerID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | PARTNER | Destination Partner id, linked to the Partner table. |
| ToWarehouse | NVARCHAR(10) | True |  | False | WAREHOUSE | Destination Warehouse, linked to the Warehouse table. |
| ToWorkcenter | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | WORK_CENTER | Destination Work Center, linked to the Work_Center table. |
| ToZone | NVARCHAR(20) | True |  | False | ZONE | Destination Zone, linked to the Zone table. |
| UnitID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | UNIT | Unique identifier of the Unit. |
| UomCode | NVARCHAR(10) | False |  | False | UOM | Product Uom. Linked to the UOM table. |
| ValidFrom | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | Card validity |
| ValidTo | DATETIME | True |  | False |  | Card validity |
| WipOrderNo | NVARCHAR(40) | True |  | False | WIP_OPERATION | WIP Order Number, link to WIP_ORDER table. |
| WipOrderType | SMALLINT(5,0) | True |  | False | WIP_OPERATION | Order Type, link to WIP_ORDER table. |

## Primary Key

- **PK_KANBAN_CARD** on `ID`

- **FK_KANBAN_CARD_ToWarehouse** — KANBAN_CARD -> WAREHOUSE (`ToFacility, ToWarehouse -> Facility, Warehouse`)
- **FK_KANBAN_CARD_ToWorkCenter** — KANBAN_CARD -> WORK_CENTER (`ToWorkcenter -> WorkCenter`)
- **FK_KANBAN_CARD_ToZone** — KANBAN_CARD -> ZONE (`ToZone -> Zone`)
- **FK_KANBAN_CARD_UnitID** — KANBAN_CARD -> UNIT (`UnitID -> ID`)
- **FK_KANBAN_CARD_UomCode** — KANBAN_CARD -> UOM (`UomCode -> UomCode`)
